## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between Contentsquare and GrowthX for AI-driven content strategy and visibility](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Contentsquare seeks to enhance AI visibility, track brand mentions, and refresh existing content across acquired brands (Heap, Hotjar)](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end content services with AI-powered workflows and expert oversight, but may not fully align with Contentsquare's current needs](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
  - [Contentsquare has an established in-house content team (10-12 freelancers) and some AI workflows, primarily seeking strategic insights and visibility tools](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)

## Topics

### Contentsquare's Content Challenges

  - [Increase AI visibility (brand visibility, citations, non-branded searches)](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Track prompts and brand mentions in AI platforms](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Rank for high-value queries (e.g., "best product analytics tools")](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Refresh and optimize existing content from acquisitions (Heap, Hotjar)](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Develop proactive outreach strategy for brand mentions](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)

### GrowthX Offerings

  - [End-to-end content partner (strategy, creation, publishing, analytics)](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows with expert oversight (e.g., deep research, fact-checking)](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Editorial content focus (blogs, guides) with potential for programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Daily content publishing capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Analytics through partnership with Scrunch for AI visibility tracking](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)

### Content Creation Approach

  - [Contentsquare: In-house team with 10-12 freelancers, some AI repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [GrowthX: AI workflows + human experts, customizable for specific needs (e.g., medical review)](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Focus on "guides" (multi-chapter blogs) for organic performance](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)

### AI Visibility Analytics

  - [Contentsquare seeks detailed insights on AI visibility, prompt tracking, and brand mentions](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [GrowthX offers analytics through Scrunch partnership, with daily (or more frequent) updates](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Ability to track custom prompts, topics, and LLM-specific visibility](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Contentsquare team to review and compare GrowthX with other tools in upcoming internal meeting](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [Valeria to follow up via email next week with decision/feedback](https://fathom.video/share/6UsmcdBw6qznkVceByHdcMRYwzgnCcpz?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
  - Potential for further discussion on specific questions if needed
